text:
I have what I need. The `Equiv.Perm` and `ContinuousLinearMap` analogues confirm the expected naming patterns.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-769b7fcf3715b77577ffb08e

```json
{
  "verdict": "request_changes",
  "summary": "All Deck-namespace names and most vendored Homeomorph names follow Mathlib conventions correctly. One instance name deviates from the established Mathlib pattern: `Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul` should carry the `_apply` suffix to match `ContinuousLinearMap.continuousConstSMul_apply`, the only Mathlib analogue for a tautological-action continuity instance.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "file": "TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck.lean",
      "line": 57,
      "issue": "`Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul` omits the `_apply` suffix used by the closest Mathlib analogue (`ContinuousLinearMap.continuousConstSMul_apply`, `Basic.lean:684`) for the same pattern: a `ContinuousConstSMul` instance arising from the tautological apply-action.",
      "fix": "Rename to `Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul_apply` and update the docstring accordingly.",
      "evidence": "`grep -rn 'continuousConstSMul_apply' mathlib` returns exactly one hit: `ContinuousLinearMap/Basic.lean:684: instance continuousConstSMul_apply : ContinuousConstSMul (M₁ →L[R₁] M₁) M₁`; no other naming form is used for this role."
    }
  ]
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: All Deck-namespace names and most vendored Homeomorph names follow Mathlib conventions correctly. One instance name deviates from the established Mathlib pattern: `Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul` should carry the `_apply` suffix to match `ContinuousLinearMap.continuousConstSMul_apply`, the only Mathlib analogue for a tautological-action continuity instance.

findings.issue: `Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul` omits the `_apply` suffix used by the closest Mathlib analogue (`ContinuousLinearMap.continuousConstSMul_apply`, `Basic.lean:684`) for the same pattern: a `ContinuousConstSMul` instance arising from the tautological apply-action.
findings.fix: Rename to `Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul_apply` and update the docstring accordingly.
findings.evidence: `grep -rn 'continuousConstSMul_apply' mathlib` returns exactly one hit: `ContinuousLinearMap/Basic.lean:684: instance continuousConstSMul_apply : ContinuousConstSMul (M₁ →L[R₁] M₁) M₁`; no other naming form is used for this role.
